latestIgtvVideos.title: SPANISH SPEED CLEAN
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Today I did a Speed Clean trying Spanish products from Senorita Sparkles as recommended by my lovely friend Georgia @cleaningcorner I find that having new products to try and ones that I love using really helps to motivate me to clean and makes it so much more enjoyable. It’s like self-care for me and my home🥰

Why not ‘like’ and ‘save’ this post so that you can watch it if you need some motivation to clean, or like me you may find these videos therapeutic to watch.

Are there any products in my haul that you fancy trying? These Spanish Cleaning products are like nothing we have in the UK and I am really looking forward to using them more around our home.

You can get 20% off @senoritasparkles_ using our code 𝐂𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐍𝐀𝐇𝐎𝐋𝐈𝐂𝟐𝟎
#speedclean

latestIgtvVideos.title: SPEED CLEAN CHRISTMAS SPECIAL
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Double tap if you love a speed clean…and today it’s a Festive Speed Clean using the Christmas scented products in my #ChristmasCleaningBasket ✨
-
I’m not sure if it’s just me, but I don’t feel like I’ve got into the festive spirit yet. We still don’t have our tree up so that probably doesn’t help but today I thought I would use my Christmas fragranced cleaning products, get the frosted berries handwash out, light the festive candles and attempt to get merry and bright! I don’t know whether or not it was the smell of winter spice and sugared almonds filling our home but it really motivated me to get cleaning before putting the tree up this week🙌🏻
-
Hopefully my speed clean will help get you in the mood to get your Christmas clean on and fill your home with festive fragrances. Have a fantastic week everyone ♥️ #speedclean

latestIgtvVideos.title: SPEED CLEAN
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Who else loves a speed clean?! 🙋🏼‍♀️ I seriously needed some motivation to clean today but I feel so much better for finally getting it done as I kept putting it off last week. A brand new week is loading so let’s do this!💪🏼 When I find products that I love using it really helps to make cleaning more enjoyable and there’s nothing better than clean fresh fragrances filling the home. Hopefully my speed clean will get you in the mood to clean or if you are like me and you just enjoy watching this type of video because you find them relaxing, plus who doesn’t love a good nose around other people’s houses.🙊Have a fantastic week everyone💜💗 #speedclean

latestIgtvVideos.title: SPEED CLEAN
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
It’s speed clean time! ⏰ Double tap if you love watching speed clean videos and having a nose around other people’s homes🙊 I was on a mission cleaning the house today! It’s amazing what you can achieve when you put your mind to it💪🏼 I hope you have had a wonderful weekend and hopefully this speed clean video will give you some inspiration and motivation for the week ahead.
p.s. Can you spot my little helper who was inspecting my cleaning?!
#speedclean

latestIgtvVideos.title: EASY GLAM TOP KNOT BUN IN UNDER 3 MINUTES
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Does anyone else find that whenever you try to put your hair into a cute messy bun it ends up looking far from glam and more like a birds nest on the top of your head?!🤦🏼‍♀️🤣 To effortlessly create that glam top knot look, I use the Clip On Bun from @hairrehablondon by @laurenpopey 💕
It’s really quick and easy:
•Pull your own hair into a bun
•Place the Clip On Bun over your own hair bun and pull the drawstrings
•Tuck the drawstrings inside of the bun to keep them hidden

Hair Rehab London provide a digital colour match service for all of their amazing selection of hairpieces and extensions. I have the Clip On Bun in shade ‘Bali Blonde’ and the colour match is spot on. I know my roots are shocking at the moment but I’m sure many of you feel my pain! AD #hairrehablondon

latestIgtvVideos.title: SPEED CLEAN
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
I really enjoy making these speed clean videos as it actually motivates me to do my housework. Although I wish it was this speedy in real life! Who else feels like they have had a productive day? If I’m honest I wasn’t really in the mood to clean today, but I wrote a list and I’m really pleased that I managed to tick everything off that I wanted to achieve. Hopefully you will enjoy watching this speed clean video and that it might give you some motivation, inspiration or even relaxation!💕

latestIgtvVideos.caption:

latestIgtvVideos.title: DON’T RUSH CHALLENGE
MERMAID HAIR TUTORIAL
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Thank you for all the love you have been giving me recently on my mermaid wavy hair vibe😘 Tag a friend who you think would nail this look💕 It’s amazing how receiving a compliment can really brighten up your day and make you feel so much more confident, especially at the moment.
-
Lots of you have asked me how I achieve this Kim Kardashian inspired style, so here is a really easy tutorial to show you using the @mermade.hair Hair Waver and @davinesofficial ‘More Inside’ Hairspray.

latestIgtvVideos.title: WORLD’S MOST POWERFUL STEAM IRON
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Does anyone else hate ironing? The @philips team must have known that I usually avoid my huge pile of ironing because they have kindly sent me the world’s fastest and most powerful steam iron to try. I am going to put it to the test and see if it really can make ironing less of a chore.
-
The Philips PerfectCare Elite Plus Steam Generator Iron is certainly the Rolls Royce when it comes to irons, definitely an investment purchase as it is a high end product that usually retails at over £500! It is an absolutely superb iron and I feel really lucky to have had the opportunity to review it💙
-
Philips are the world’s leading brand when it comes to ironing solutions. I have now realised that the reason I was putting off doing the ironing all the time was because our iron is terrible! Having a quality iron is an absolute game changer and Philips have a range of innovative products to suit every budget, making ironing faster and less like hard work.
-
To have a nose at this incredible iron and the full range of Philips Ironing Solutions click the link below when watching on IGTV:

https://amzn.to/2ypFhRe ———————
AD GIFTED @philipsuk

latestIgtvVideos.title: QUICK NATURAL EVERYDAY MAKEUP
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
As requested by you, it’s my first ever make up tutorial 💕 Double tap if you would like more videos like this. I find that if I’m having a bad day, putting on some makeup just makes me feel so much better. Who’s with me?🥰
-
I absolutely love trying out different products, mixing designer brands with bargain beauty buys of course! I am certainly no MUA, it’s just me sharing the products that I enjoy using💋

latestIgtvVideos.title: KARCHER PRESSURE WASHER PATIO SPEED CLEAN
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Who else is going to pressure wash their patio this weekend? Mr Cleanaholic has been testing out the Karcher K5 Premium Full Control Plus Home Pressure Washer in his debut #speedclean IGTV. On my stories 99% of the vote wanted him to film it, so let’s give him some love!💛🖤@karcher_uk #KarcherSpringClean
-
The K5 with Full Control Power Gun PLUS and 3-in-1 Multi Jet made the job much easier as it also includes the Home Kit, which is the Patio Surface Cleaner and 1L Stone Cleaner.
-
We have used a variety of different Karcher Pressure Washers in the past and they have always been high quality, long lasting machines. The K5 is useful for a variety of tasks, making your outdoor cleaning much more efficient so that you can prepare your garden ready to enjoy it this Spring💛🖤
-
AD GIFTED
——————————
#gardencleaning #pressurewasher #karcher #pressurewashing #cleanfluencer #ukblogger #cleaning

organising a cupboard that gives me a micro stress every time I open it😅

decluttering can be overwhelming but doing one cupboard at a time really helps me to get started and make progress. 

I use the “grab & go” method - if you can’t easily grab an item in one go then rearrange it.  let me know if you give it a go✨

Step by step guide:
1️⃣empty the cupboard

2️⃣vacuum and wipe down the cupboard

3️⃣organise the items then put them back in the cupboard

4️⃣Donate any unused, unwanted items to your local food bank

5️⃣dispose of any out of date items

#satisfyingcleaning #cleaningmotivation #cleanwithme

THE best mop for a quick clean is now on a deal for Amazon Prime Day!🫧✨

The Flash Speedmop is so much better than a mop and bucket and it is so versatile, not only can you use it to clean up tough mess on the floors but I also use mine for cleaning the bathroom tiles and kitchen cupboards😉

Comment “MOP” and I will message the link to shop the Flash Speedmop deal on Amazon directly to your inbox

ad-ambassador @joyofclean

Is your washing machine smelling musty… I’ve got you covered🧺

I like to call it my five minute washing machine spa treatment😉🫧✨

1️⃣Empty & clean the filter- I always seem to find dog treats and hair clips stuck in mine!

2️⃣Remove the drawer and clean using hot soapy water. Clean behind the drawer using Viakal to remove any build up of limescale or soap

3️⃣Clean the seal using a bathroom cleaner to remove any mould 

4️⃣Add a washing machine cleaner (I’m using the new Vamoosh Floral dreams cleaner which smells DIVINE)

5️⃣Put on a hot empty wash cycle

#cleanwithme #deepcleaning

how to make your windows sparkle and let the sunshine into your home☀️

✨brush down the cobwebs

✨mop your windows using hot soapy water

✨use a window vac to remove the residue

✨spritz the inside of the windows using Flash Spray Wipe Done and the Spontex Window and Glass cloth (the BEST combo for shiny, streak free windows😉)

#satisfyingcleaning #cleaningmotivation

(not sure what the postman thought when I answered the door🤭)
